jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Fyers
jsonLd.description:
Fyers is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
